description: Illustrative MCP tool sketches for CCP Care Facility Pickup Verification. JSON Schema remains the canonical CCP contract.

tools.name: ccp_care_facility_pickup_verification_request
tools.title: Request CCP Care Facility Pickup Verification
tools.description: Verify whether a specific pickup actor is authorized to pick up one pet for a specific facility and service window. The server evaluates requester identity, pet identity, facility identity, service identity, pickup actor identity, scopes, purpose, active grant, visibility classes, and freshness. Protocol-level denials return a CCP response envelope with status `denied`.
